//1: This file documents every configuration key the API expects. Copy it into
//3: values as Azure App Service application settings (for production).
//5: Comment keys ("//", "//1", ...) are ignored by the .NET configuration system
//6: and exist only so that this template can self-document.

ConnectionStrings.//: DefaultConnection: SQL Server connection string for the application database.
ConnectionStrings.//2: Production: use the Azure SQL connection string from the Bicep deployment.
ConnectionStrings.//3: AzureSignalR (optional): if present, the API uses Azure SignalR Service.
ConnectionStrings.//4: If absent, SignalR runs in-process (suitable for development and small deployments).

Storage.//: BlobConnectionString: Azure Blob Storage connection string for image and asset uploads.
Storage.//1: Local dev can use Azurite emulator: 'UseDevelopmentStorage=true'
Storage.//2: ImagesContainer: container name for uploaded images (default 'images').

Cookie.//: Name of the auth cookie. Default is .CredoCms.Auth.
Cookie.//1: Domain (optional): set when the API and SPA are served from different subdomains.
Cookie.Name: .CredoCms.Auth

Cors.//: Development-only CORS allowlist. Production serves the SPA from wwwroot,
Cors.//1: so this should be empty (or absent) in production. The API only honors this

Identity.//: Default Administrator credentials, used ONLY by seed data on first run.
Identity.//1: REQUIRED to be changed on first sign-in (RequirePasswordChangeOnFirstLogin = true).
Identity.//2: REQUIRED to be set to a strong, unique password before any production deployment.

Versioning.//: Trim background-service schedule (cron in UTC). Default 03:00 UTC daily.
Versioning.//1: DefaultRetentionCount: how many history rows to keep per versioned entity unless
Versioning.//2: overridden in Site Settings. Range 5–50, hard-capped server-side.

Serilog.//: Standard Serilog config. Console + rolling-file sinks by default.
Serilog.//1: ApplicationInsights sink is enabled when ApplicationInsights.ConnectionString is set.

ApplicationInsights.//: Optional. Set this to enable Application Insights telemetry + Serilog sink.
